observations: YAML frontmatter only, no body content
target uses a board:// URI scheme
standouts: Typed cross-reference to a board item via board:// URI
Minimal metadata-only record with a stable attachment id
concerns: No payload or description of the referenced board item
No provenance fields such as author or editor
notes: A bare ledger attachment pointer linking a board item to the dragnet-development channel with only metadata and no content payload.
questions: What is the content or title of board item item-79c533e9?

intention_signals: To create a durable, timestamped ledger entry that records the association of a specific board item with the dragnet-development channel as a board_items attachment.
contribution: Provides a stable, typed, timestamped link between a channel and a board item, enabling graph traversal, audit, and attachment discovery without embedding the target content.
